description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, futuristic design with a predominantly metallic brown and black finish, accented by a dark blue cylindrical barrel running along the top. The body is streamlined, with angular lines and a compact form factor, suggesting a modern or sci-fi aesthetic. The grip is solid and angular, with a pronounced trigger guard and a smooth, ergonomic handle. The barrel is single and elongated, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the overall build appears robust and durable. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample protection for the trigger area. The shotgun lacks a traditional stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for compact handling.
description: A sleek, modern shotgun with a metallic brown and black finish, single barrel, and pistol grip, designed with angular lines and a robust build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the metallic brown body, black grip, and dark blue barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow, elongated barrel and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the same features from the other side, including the grip and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the end of the barrel, emphasizing the shotgun's compactness.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, elongated barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, substantial size, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
